v2.subtitle: Search creators by name or linked username, filter by curation types, or require minimum credited-level counts per curation type.

basics.title: Name & username search
basics.intro: Plain text matches creator names, aliases, and linked account usernames. Use commas for AND inside a group, and | for OR groups.

examples.plainName: Camellia finds creators whose name or alias partially matches.
examples.username: @yoon finds the creator linked to that exact username.
examples.combine: Epic,C3>3 — combine a name fragment with a curation count in one AND group.

curationCounts.title: Curation count constraints
curationCounts.intro: Require a minimum (or exact) number of credited levels for a curation type. Use the type's exact name, then a comparison and integer count.

examples.single: C3>3 — creators with more than 3 credited levels that have curation type C3.
examples.withName: Epic,C3>3 — name search AND curation count in one group.

facetFilter.title: Curation type filter (panel)
facetFilter.intro: Open Filters and use the Curation Types builder to require creators to have specific curation types on their credited levels (same AND/OR/advanced rules as level search facets).

examples.simple: Simple mode: pick types and choose whether the creator must have any or all of them.
examples.advanced: Advanced mode: group types with ALL/ANY, chain groups with AND/OR, and exclude types.

tips.title: Tips
tips.intro: Details that help avoid empty or surprising results.

bullets.typeNameExact: Curation type names must match exactly (e.g. C3, not c3, unless your database uses different casing).
bullets.unknownType: An unknown type name in a count token returns no results.
bullets.facetAndQuery: Facet filters and search-box count tokens combine with AND — both must be satisfied.

operatorComma.title: AND inside a group
operatorComma.desc: Separate terms with commas to require all conditions in the group.

operatorPipe.title: OR between groups
operatorPipe.desc: Use | to split your query into OR groups. If any group matches, the creator is included.

atUsername.title: @username
atUsername.desc: Prefix with @ to find a creator by their linked account username (exact match).

opEq.title: Exact count
opEq.desc: Append =N after the type name for an exact credited-level count.
